title: lilium nanum f. flavidum
intro: Lilium nanum f. flavidum, also known as the Dwarf Yellow Lily, is a rare and lesser-known species of lily that belongs to the genus Lilium. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bulbs and flowers, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Lilium nanum f. flavidum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs and flowers are often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
